authors.author: William J. Gaither
William J. Gaither
Ich bin gefahren durch die weite Welt

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve never travelled far around the world, I’ve never seen so many things And thrills afar But I have taken a journey of journeys for me; Up calvary’s mountain There my saviour to see.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’ve been to calvary, I can say I’ve seen the Lord I’ve been to calvary, Through the witness of His Word, Each day at calvary, What a thrill of joy divine Just to know, that the Saviour Is mine.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I walked up calvary’s road, Where Jesus trod; I saw Him hanging there, The Son of God, With tear strained eyes I knelt and prayed ‘Jesus save my soul Oh praise the Lord, I’m glad I’ve been to calvary.
